# Rimbo — Digital Loyalty Platform

> Rimbo is a SaaS loyalty platform for businesses in Ukraine. It provides digital stamp cards, bonuses, cashback, tiered discounts, promo codes, gift cards, and smart coupons — all managed from a single dashboard.

## Key Features
- Google Wallet & Apple Wallet integration
- QR-code scanning for stamp/bonus accrual
- Push notifications
- Live analytics across multiple locations
- POS integration (Poster, Checkbox)
- Team access with role-based permissions
- Full API for custom integrations
- White-label card design

## Pricing (UAH/month)
- Start: 349/mo (299 annual)
- Growth: 799/mo (699 annual) — most popular
- Pro: 1399/mo (1199 annual)
- Custom: 1999/mo (1699 annual)
- 14-day free trial on all plans

## Pages
- / — Home (Ukrainian)
- /en — Home (English)
- /privacy — Privacy Policy (Ukrainian)
- /en/privacy — Privacy Policy (English)
- /terms — Terms of Use (Ukrainian)
- /en/terms — Terms of Use (English)
- /digital-loyalty-cards — Digital loyalty cards in customers' phones (Ukrainian)
- /en/digital-loyalty-cards — Digital loyalty cards in customers' phones (English)
- /customer-analytics — Customer analytics for your business (Ukrainian)
- /en/customer-analytics — Customer analytics for your business (English)
- /loyalty-automation — Loyalty program automation (Ukrainian)
- /en/loyalty-automation — Loyalty program automation (English)

## Contact
- Email: billing@rimbo.io
- Support: Mon-Fri 10:00-18:00, Sat-Sun 11:00-15:00 (Kyiv time)
